Get To Know Us

Discipline. Order. Practice. Excellence.

Our mission is to inspire students to uncover and nurture their creative side in a warm and inviting environment.

Book Free ConsultationExplore Classes
About ORDS

A passionate team of talented and creative instructors.

With personalized lessons tailored for each student, ORDS exists to develop musicians with skill, confidence, discipline, and purpose.

The Team

Meet ORDS.

Instructors and mentors serving students, musicians, and creatives.

Founder & Drum Instructor

Oscar Ramos

Oscar is a dedicated drummer and educator focused on building disciplined musicians with strong foundations, confidence, and excellence in worship and performance.

@tito_ovr
Drum Instructor

Bryan

Bryan has over 10 years of drumming experience with a foundation built through school band. He helps students grow through fundamentals, timing, and disciplined practice.

@adonai.wav
Bass / Piano Instructor

David

David builds bass and piano students with strong timing, groove, and musical understanding so they can lock in, serve the band, and play with excellence.

@davidvaldez421
Guitar Instructor

Osiel

Osiel teaches practical musicianship with discipline and clarity, helping students build timing, technique, confidence, and worship-ready playing.

@osielelbajista
Guitar Coach / Pedalboard FX

Jorge Saenz

Jorge specializes in contemporary guitar, tone, technique, and musical expression, with coaching for pedalboards and confident live playing.

@jasaenz
In-Person Vocal Instructor

Angel

A Liberty University graduate in Vocal Performance, Angel helps singers build healthy technique, confidence, and worship-focused musicality. He has taught since 2018 through churches, music academies, and private lessons.

Ready?

Start your musical journey today.

Book a free consultation and find the right next step with ORDS.
